hero.tagline: What's playing in Berlin. Curated by the scene, made by one of us.

cta.title: Putting on Latin music shows? Make them visible.

apply.metaDescription: Join La Huella del Caminante as a creator: apply, we review in 1-2 days, you publish your events.
apply.title: Tell us who you are.
apply.body: Applying is step two. We review your profile — usually 1-2 days. If everything checks out, your account is activated to publish events.

section.title: About you
section.description: Tell us who you are, what you do, what you're working on. The more you share, the better we can evaluate.

form.name: Your name or artist name
form.namePlaceholder: DJ Cumbia · Banda XYZ · María García
form.message: Tell us about yourself and your events
form.messagePlaceholder: Who are you? What kind of events do you organize or where do you perform?

submitted.title: We got your request, <accent>wanderer.</accent>
submitted.body: A human reviews it in the next 1-2 days. If everything checks out, we email you and unlock your panel so you can publish.
submitted.instagramHint: Meanwhile: follow us on <ig>Instagram @lahuelladelcaminante</ig> — we post every time we approve a new creator.

timeline.title: WHAT'S NEXT
timeline.reviewingSub: A human is looking at your profile
timeline.approvalSub: You'll get an email with the link to your panel

image.title: Flyer
image.description: Upload the event flyer. JPG and PNG, up to 10 files.

fields.title: Event title
fields.titlePlaceholder: Cumbia Night · Tango Live · Latino Festival
fields.descriptionPlaceholder: Tell us what happens at the show: bands, DJs, format...
fields.addressHelper: As exact as possible — used for Google Maps.
fields.organizerPlaceholder: Name of the collective / promoter / organizing artist
fields.genreHelper: Pick one or more. If it's not listed, type it to create it.

bio.title: The story
bio.description: Tell it as if talking to a friend. What you don't write today, you write tomorrow.

image.title: Photos
image.description: Upload 1-3 strong photos. Aim for presence, not perfection.

social.title: Where to find them
social.description: All optional. If they don't have an account on a network, leave it blank.

fields.name: Artist name
fields.bioPlaceholder: What they do, where they played, who they look up to...

access.voluntaryNote: Whatever you can contribute. Pay at the door.
access.unknownNote: Reach out to the organizer for more info.

artistDetail.noUpcomingShows: No upcoming shows for now. Follow us on socials to stay tuned.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard

welcome.title: Three steps to publish your first event.
welcome.body: Your account was approved — welcome to la huella. We'll walk you through publishing your first event.

profile.title: Create your first artist
profile.body: An artist is the musician or band you present — photo, bio, links to Instagram and Spotify. It's the page that opens when someone taps your event.

event.title: Publish your first event
event.body: Upload your Instagram flyer (1:1 or 4:5), find a venue, add a date, pick a genre.

share.title: Share your link
share.body: Your event is live at lahuelladelcaminante.de/events. Paste it in your stories, groups, anywhere.

help.body: How do I write a good description? · Recommended image sizes · Need help?

empty.upcoming: No upcoming events. Publish one when you have a date.
empty.all: You haven't created any events yet.

artists.title: My artists
artists.count: {count, plural, =0 {no active artists} one {# active artist} other {# active artists}}
artists.empty: You haven't created any artists yet.

dashboard.profileDeleteWarning: This action is irreversible. Your account and all your creations (events, artists, images) will be deleted.

profilePublic.title: Your public profile
profilePublic.bioPlaceholder: Tell people what kind of events you organize, where you usually play, what you're working on. Max 500 characters.
profilePublic.bioCharsLeft: {count, plural, =0 {No characters left} one {# character left} other {# characters left}}
profilePublic.slugChangeWarning: Changing the URL breaks old links. Anyone who had the old link saved will get a 404.
profilePublic.slugCollision: That URL is already taken, try another.

forms.noImages: No images yet. Upload 1 or more.

footer.tagline: Live Latin music in Germany. Made in Berlin.
footer.copyright: © {year} La Huella del Caminante. Made with ♥ in Berlin by Thusspokedata

contact.metaDescription: Reach out for suggestions, press, partnerships, or anything else.
contact.title: Get in touch.
contact.body: We read every message. We usually reply within 2-3 business days. If you're an artist looking to publish your events, there's a <applyLink>dedicated flow</applyLink>.

success.title: Thanks, {name}.
success.body: We got your message. We'll reply to the email you provided, usually within 2-3 business days.

error.title: We couldn't send your message
error.body: There was a connection issue. Please try again in a moment.

rateLimit.title: Too many requests
rateLimit.body: Wait a moment before trying again.

alternatives.title: Other paths
alternatives.artist: Are you an artist or organizer? To publish your events, <applyLink>apply here</applyLink>.

notFound.title: This trail doesn't exist yet.
notFound.body: The event you're looking for may have passed or the link is stale. Try the current agenda.

error.title: The path tangled up for a moment.
error.body: Try again. If it keeps happening, let us know.

signIn.title: Sign in.
signIn.subtitle: You don't need an account to see shows. Sign in to get back into yours.
signIn.footer: First time here? <createAccount>Create account</createAccount> or <applyAsArtist>apply as a creator →</applyAsArtist>

errors.generic: Sign-in failed. Try again in a moment.

hero.title: Made by one <accent>of you</accent>.
hero.body: La Huella is an independent portal. We don't sell tickets, we don't take a cut. We just show what's playing.

signUp.title: Start <accent>publishing.</accent>
signUp.subtitle: Creating an account is free and instant. If you later want to publish events, you apply as a creator — that part we review, usually 1-2 days.
signUp.passwordHint: Mix uppercase, numbers and a symbol.
signUp.acceptTerms: I accept the <terms>terms</terms> and the <privacy>privacy policy</privacy>.

errors.email_taken: There's already an account with that email. Try signing in.
errors.terms_required: You need to accept the terms to continue.
errors.generic: We couldn't create your account. Try again.

hero.title: From new account to live event <accent>in days</accent>.
hero.support: We're based in Berlin and respond in Spanish, English and German. If you have questions, <contactLink>write us</contactLink>.

account.signOutError: Couldn't sign you out. Try again.

pending.title: Your request is <accent>warming up in the oven.</accent>
pending.bodyWithDate: You applied as a creator on {date}. We review in order of arrival — usually 1-2 business days. We'll email you the moment it's approved.
pending.bodyNoDate: We review in order of arrival — usually 1-2 business days. We'll email you the moment it's approved.
pending.escapeHatch: More than 3 days and no reply? Something broke. <contactLink>Write us</contactLink> and we'll sort it out.

blocked.title: Your account can't access the panel.
blocked.body: This can happen for several reasons — community-rules violation, reported content, or a mistake on our end. If you think it's a mistake, let's talk.
blocked.canSee: You can still see all the public events on the site.
blocked.canBrowse: You can still browse artist profiles.
blocked.cannot: You can't publish, edit or access the creator panel.

notCreator.title: Your account isn't a creator account yet.
notCreator.body: To publish events on La Huella, you first need to apply as a creator. We review every request — it usually takes 1-2 days.

rejected.title: Your request wasn't approved this time.
rejected.body: You can apply again whenever you want. If you have questions about why, get in touch.

welcomeUser.subject: Welcome to La Huella del Caminante
welcomeUser.heading: Welcome to the journey
welcomeUser.intro: La Huella del Caminante is the home of live Latin American music in Germany.
welcomeUser.body: Your account is now active. Explore the concert calendar and discover artists from across the scene.
welcomeUser.creatorNudge: Do you organize events? You can apply as a creator to publish your own on the platform.

impressum.metaDescription: Legal notice and provider identification of La Huella del Caminante pursuant to § 5 DDG.
impressum.title: Legal notice (Impressum)
impressum.bindingNote: This is a courtesy translation. The legally binding version is the German one.
impressum.contactForm: A second way to reach us is available through our <contactLink>contact form</contactLink>.
impressum.responsibleBody: Antonio Saleme Sastre, address as stated above.
impressum.euDisputeBody: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR): <odrLink>ec.europa.eu/consumers/odr</odrLink>. Our email address can be found above in this legal notice.
impressum.euDisputeNote: We are neither obliged nor willing to take part in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.liabilityContentBody: The contents of our pages were created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee that the contents are accurate, complete or up to date. As a service provider, we are responsible for our own content on these pages in accordance with general law (§ 7 (1) DDG). However, under §§ 8 to 10 DDG we are not obliged to monitor transmitted or stored third-party information, or to investigate circumstances that indicate unlawful activity. Obligations to remove or block the use of information under general law remain unaffected. Liability in this regard is, however, only possible from the point in time at which we become aware of a specific infringement. Upon becoming aware of such infringements, we will remove that content immediately.
impressum.liabilityLinksBody: Our offering contains links to external third-party websites over whose content we have no influence. We therefore cannot assume any liability for this third-party content. The respective provider or operator of the linked pages is always responsible for their content. The linked pages were checked for possible legal infringements at the time of linking; no unlawful content was apparent at that time. Permanent monitoring of the content of the linked pages is, however, not reasonable without concrete evidence of an infringement. Upon becoming aware of infringements, we will remove such links immediately.
impressum.copyrightBody: The content and works created by the site operator on these pages are subject to German copyright law. Third-party contributions are marked as such. Reproduction, processing, distribution and any kind of use beyond the limits of copyright require the written consent of the respective author or creator. Downloads and copies of this site are permitted for private, non-commercial use only.

datenschutz.metaDescription: Privacy policy of La Huella del Caminante in accordance with the GDPR.
datenschutz.title: Privacy policy
datenschutz.bindingNote: This is a courtesy translation. The legally binding version is the German one.
datenschutz.controllerIntro: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
datenschutz.generalBody: We take the protection of your personal data seriously: we treat it confidentially and in accordance with statutory data protection regulations (GDPR) and this privacy policy. Personal data is data that can be used to identify you personally. This website can be used without providing personal data; we only collect data where you actively provide it to us, for example when creating an account or submitting a form.
datenschutz.collectionHeading: Data we collect on this website
datenschutz.collectionAccount: User account: when you create an account we collect your name, your email address and a password (stored encrypted/hashed — we cannot see the plain-text password). The legal basis is the performance of the usage contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
datenschutz.collectionContact: Contact form: when you write to us via the contact form, we process your name, your email address, the type of enquiry and your message in order to handle your request. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in answering enquiries or your consent (Art. 6(1)(f) or (a) GDPR).
datenschutz.collectionApplication: Creator application: when you apply as a creator via the /apply form, we process the data you provide there (name, email address and your message) in order to review your application. The legal basis is the initiation or performance of a contractual relationship (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR).
datenschutz.hostingBody: The website runs on our own server (Virtual Private Server, Ubuntu) within the European Union. The database is operated on Neon (managed PostgreSQL). When the website is accessed, technically necessary access data, for example the IP address and the time of the request, is processed insofar as this is required for secure operation.
datenschutz.processorsIntro: For some functions we use carefully selected providers that process data on our behalf. The data processing agreements required by data protection law are in place with them.
datenschutz.processorsCloudinary: Cloudinary — storage and delivery of the images (event flyers, artist photos) uploaded by creators. <link>Cloudinary privacy policy</link>.
datenschutz.processorsResend: Resend — sending of transactional emails (contact form, creator application notifications, welcome and sign-up notification emails). <link>Resend privacy policy</link>.
datenschutz.processorsNeon: Neon — managed PostgreSQL database where the application data is stored. <link>Neon privacy policy</link>.
datenschutz.cookiesBody: This website uses exclusively technically necessary cookies: a cookie for your signed-in session (Better Auth) and a cookie for your language preference (NEXT_LOCALE). We do not use analytics, tracking or marketing cookies. As only technically necessary cookies are used, no consent is required for them.
datenschutz.analyticsBody: To measure how the site is used, we run Umami, an open-source analytics tool self-hosted on our own server within the European Union. Umami works without cookies and builds no personal profiles: it only collects aggregated information such as pages visited, referrer, browser and device type, and country. IP addresses are not stored. The data never leaves our server and is not shared with third parties. The legal basis is our legitimate interest in the statistical analysis and improvement of the site (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR).
datenschutz.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights regarding your personal data at any time:
datenschutz.rightAccess: Right of access to the data stored about you.
datenschutz.rightRectification: Right to rectification of inaccurate data.
datenschutz.rightErasure: Right to erasure of your data.
datenschutz.rightComplaint: Right to lodge a complaint with a data protection supervisory authority.
datenschutz.securityBody: For security reasons, this website uses SSL/TLS encryption. You can recognise an encrypted connection by https:// in your browser's address bar. Passwords are stored only in encrypted (hashed) form. Despite all care, complete security of data transmission over the internet cannot be guaranteed.

cookieNotice.body: This site uses only essential technical cookies (session and language) — no tracking, no advertising. More in our <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink>.

newsletter.pageDescription: Subscribe to receive the upcoming Latin events in Berlin every week.
newsletter.formConsent: I agree to receive the weekly newsletter from La Huella del Caminante. I can unsubscribe at any time.
newsletter.successMessage: Done! Check your email to confirm your subscription.
newsletter.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
newsletter.confirmedBanner: Subscription confirmed! Starting next Monday you'll receive the week's events.
newsletter.tokenExpiredMessage: The confirmation link has expired. Subscribe again to receive a new email.

calendar.pageDescription: All events from the Latin scene in Berlin

dashboard.title: Scene entries
dashboard.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
